name: AgentRadar
description: AI-first agent application directory for discovering and listing AI agent tools and services across multiple blockchain ecosystems.

search.description: Full-text search across agent tool listings by name, description, category, chain, and tags

detail.description: Get detailed information about a specific agent tool by slug or UUID

submit.description: Submit a new agent tool for listing in the directory (pending admin review)

submission_status.description: Check the review status of a submitted listing

categories.description: List all available categories with UUIDs for filtering and submission

chains.description: List all supported blockchain chains with UUIDs

tags.description: List all tags with listing counts

authentication.public_endpoints: All GET endpoints and POST /api/listings are public (no auth required)
authentication.admin_endpoints: Admin endpoints at /api/admin/* require Authorization: Bearer <token> header
